findings.evidence: Grep hits in the PR: lines 62-66 are the rewrite chain. Mathlib has `setIntegral_indicator` at `Mathlib/MeasureTheory/Integral/Bochner/Set.lean:196` and `integral_indicator_one` at `.../Set.lean:536`.
findings.fix: Replace the body of `hint` with the existing stable API, e.g. `setIntegral_indicator (hW hB)` followed by `setIntegral_const`/`Set.inter_comm`, or use `integral_indicator_one` for the restricted measure.
findings.issue: `hint` proves the indicator set-integral by chaining `integral_indicator`, `integral_const`, `Measure.restrict_restrict`, and `Measure.real` rewrites, exposing the proof to measure/integral API churn.

summary: The duplicated normalization was factored, but the remaining local proof still uses a brittle five-step rewrite through set-integral internals where Mathlib has stable indicator/set-integral API.
